mxlibrary: [{"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Tachodynamo"}, {"xml": "", "w": 50, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-phase generator"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "DC generator"}, {"xml": "", "w": 70, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "PVCell"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 260, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Vertical wind turbine"}, {"xml": "", "w": 280, "h": 190, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Diesel Engine"}, {"xml": "", "w": 200, "h": 190, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "MicroTurbine"}, {"xml": "", "w": 60, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Battery one element"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Battery one element (short)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 60, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Battery 2 elements"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Current source (new)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Current source (old)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Voltage source (new)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Voltage source (old)"}]
